nasb.text: Then I said to her, “You shall stay with me for many days. You shall not play the harlot, nor shall you have a man; so I will also be toward you.”

esv.text: And I said to her, “You must dwell as mine for many days. You shall not play the whore, or belong to another man; so will I also be to you.”

cnv.text: 我對她說：“你要給我獨居多日，不要行淫，不要有別的男人，我也必不與你同房。”

ccb.text: 对她说：“你要和我住许多日子。这期间不可行淫，不可亲近别的男人，我也不与你同房。”
